name: /measure-rubric iterated_commits caps at the actual git log depth when --n exceeds available history per F-2
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c1 && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c2 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 100 --format json >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.iterated_commits===2?0:1)' && echo capped 1>&2
